title: Sarc@kiym #8310
definition:
Sarsechim = "prince of the eunuchs"

 1) a ruler or general of Nebuchadnezzar at the taking of Jerusalem
nasbUsage:

 1) a ruler or general of Nebuchadnezzar at the taking of Jerusalem

    NASB:  one of Nebuchadnezzars princes
